name: Itappens.ai
brand_voice: Confident, authoritative, slightly aggressive against traditional SEO. Tech-savvy.

context: itappens.ai is an autonomous AI workforce company. We provide a 'Weaponized GEO Audit' that analyzes competitors' citation gaps in LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity. We believe traditional SEO is dying, and AEO/GEO (Answer Engine Optimization) is the future.
